{{Quote|Mr. Calrissian this is Frang Colgter. My husband. We just got back from our honeymoon last week.|Condren Foreck, to Lando Calrissian|<ref name="Ambush at Corellia" />}}
'''Frang Colgter''' was the husband of [[Condren Foreck]] who was a wealthy farmer's daughter on the [[Agriworld/Legends|agriworld]] of [[Azbrian]].<ref name="Ambush at Corellia" />

==Biography==
Frang's marriage to Condren happened to coincide with [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian's]] arrival, in which he hoped to make a proposal to Condren. The unfortunate chain of events led Lando, in his subsequent nuptial visits, to call first rather than arrive unannounced.<ref name="Ambush at Corellia" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Ambush at Corellia]]'' {{1st}}
